data.title: Adair & Co appoints Kim Killian as new CRO from Jan 1, 2026, to scale client impact nationwide.
data.description: Kim Killian has been named the new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) of Adair & Company, starting from January 1, 2026. This appointment signifies a strategic move for the organization as they aim to enhance their revenue-related operations with Killian's expertise. This decision is key for the company's future growth and financial performance.

data.title: 500+ students, parents, teachers to rally at Wisconsin Capitol for School Choice Week on Jan. 27. Voice support for educational options.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, on January 27, 2026, over 500 students, parents, and teachers are set to gather at the Capitol to commemorate School Choice Week. The event aims to showcase the accomplishments of various educational options.

data.title: ICIS & ICE launch base oils futures contracts using ICIS benchmarks in London on Jan. 13, 2026 for risk management.
data.description: In a move aimed at introducing risk management tools to the market, Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), a major global player, is launching a new set of exchange-backed base oils futures contracts utilizing ICIS benchmarks. Prior to this initiative, the market primarily operated on a physical trading basis. The launch is scheduled in London on January 13, 2026. This new suite of futures contracts is expected to enhance the market's stability and offer users valuable hedging opportunities.

data.title: 450+ students, parents, teachers to celebrate school choice at Capitol event in Denver on Jan. 27.
data.description: In Denver on Tuesday, January 27th, 2026, over 450 students, parents, and teachers will come together at the Capitol to commemorate the achievements of school choice. They will be celebrating the opportunities provided by educational options.

data.title: Blackline Safety Corp introduces G8, the most connected safety wearable; offers gas detection, lone worker protection, and communication.
data.description: A company based in Calgary, Canada, that focuses on connected safety technology, Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN), revealed the latest innovation in worksite safety technology named G8. This wearable device represents the most connected creation from the company, integrating advanced gas detection, protection for lone workers, and high-quality communication capabilities. G8 is constructed as a comprehensive platform that unites workers among themselves, their safety teams, and the entire digital worksite. This rugged device serves as an all-in-one solution, offering a seamless connection to enhance safety measures at worksites.

data.title: TTE Strategy opens first office outside Europe in Dubai, expanding into Gulf Region to work with family businesses.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, TTE Strategy launched its inaugural office outside Europe in Dubai, UAE, marking its expansion into the Gulf Region. The consultancy's move aims to enhance its services for family businesses, private sector entities, and industrial clients. This significant development underscores TTE Strategy's commitment to broadening its global presence and catering to a wider client base beyond Europe.

data.title: TJX recalls Isla Rae Magnetic Wireless Chargers due to fire risk at Marshalls & T.J. Maxx; UBS raises price forecast from $181 to $193.
data.description: TJX Companies, Inc. has issued a safety recall for the Isla Rae Magnetic Wireless Chargers sold at Marshalls and T.J. Maxx stores, following a notice from the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission on January 8, 2026. The recall was initiated due to concerns that the chargers may rupture while in use, potentially causing fires or burns. UBS analyst Jay Sole, on the same day, upgraded the rating for TJX Companies, Inc. shares from Buy with a price target increase from $181 to $193. The affected phone accessory was available for purchase at the mentioned stores. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Goodwill Houston and CompuCycle team up to offer simple electronics recycling in Houston, allowing residents to donate and recycle household electronics efficiently.
data.description: In Houston on January 13, 2026, Goodwill Houston partnered with CompuCycle to offer the community a convenient and reliable option for donating and recycling household electronics. This new collaboration allows Houston residents to dispose of items such as laptops, desktops, tablets, and monitors easily.

data.title: Awardco launches Awardco Engage™, a platform offering surveys, insights, and action planning for HR teams. SALT LAKE CITY, Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: The latest offering integrates surveys, insights, and action planning in a single platform utilized for recognition and rewards, allowing HR departments to transition from feedback to impactful change. This development was announced in Salt Lake City on January 13, 2026, by Awardco, a prominent provider of employee recognition and rewards solutions.

data.title: Global humanoid robot actuator market projected to reach $9.86 billion by 2031, with an 80.0% CAGR. Starting at $150 million in 2024.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of January 13, 2026, the market size of Humanoid Robot Actuator is a topic of interest. The global market for this product was valued at USD 150 million in 2024. There are projections indicating that this figure will increase significantly, reaching a size of USD 9864 million by the year 2031. data.title: Boliden's Q4 2025 report to be announced on Feb 3 at 07:45 (CET), followed by a conference at 09:30.
data.description: Boliden is set to release its Interim Report for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 3, 2026, at 07:45 (CET). A press conference and analyst briefing are scheduled for the same day at 09:30 and will be accessible through webcast and telephone. This financial update provides insights into the company's performance during a crucial period, and stakeholders are keenly anticipating the figures and analyses presented.

data.title: Ditto appoints Wendy R. Anderson as Senior Strategic Advisor for Public Sector operations platform.
data.description: Atlanta-based technology company, Ditto, has appointed Wendy R. Anderson as Senior Strategic Advisor for the Public Sector division. Ditto is known for its software platform designed to support uninterrupted operations, specifically for mission-critical applications. The platform ensures functionality even in the face of latency, outages, and disconnections across various devices and cloud services. It caters to global enterprises and public sector units functioning in environments with limited connectivity. Wendy R. Anderson's new role aims to enhance Ditto's support for public sector teams facing connectivity challenges.

data.title: Choura Events expands into Northern California amid Monterey County's hospitality boom. Jan 13, 2026.
data.description: In Monterey, California, on January 13, 2026, Choura Events is making a significant move to establish a stronger foothold in Northern California. This expansion aligns with Monterey County's growing status as a top spot for hospitality, motorsports, and cultural gatherings. The company aims to prioritize partnerships within the community as it expands its operations northward.
